title: 3B Model Scaling — Does Verify-Repair Still Help at 3B?

H1_verify_repair_helps_less_on_3b.hypothesis: Verify-repair delta(3B) < delta(0.8B) on standard GSM8K
H1_verify_repair_helps_less_on_3b.note: 3B Δ=-2.0% vs 0.8B Δ=+0.0% on standard GSM8K (N=200) — 3B delta SMALLER (hypothesis confirmed)

H2_adversarial_still_significant_at_3b.note: Adversarial improvement NOT significant at 3B (CI includes 0)

H3_adversarial_delta_greater_than_standa.hypothesis: Adversarial delta > standard delta (EBM more useful on hard inputs)

result_header: VALIDATED LIVE RESULT: Experiment 184 records `inference_mode=live_gpu` via `metadata.inference_mode`. This artifact is treated as validated live evidence in the public docs.
